error.dynamic: The following error occurred at {operation} - {errormsg}. Please try again.
error.existent_user_not_logged: Username reserved by registered user. Choose another
error.name_already_exists: That name is already in use. Choose another
error.no_joined_room: You have been disconnected from room {roomName}
error.non_existing_room_exp: The room you are trying to access does not exist. It may have been closed or you may have mistyped the url if you entered it manually.
error.not_public_room: The room you are trying to access is not public
error.player_name_in_use: There is already a player with that name. Choose another
error.server_misconfig: Server configuration error (JWT_WS_SECRET missing). Contact the administrator
error.unique_email: The email already exists. Provide another
error.unique_roomname: There is already a room with that name. Choose another
error.user_blocked: User has been blocked, try later.
error.user_not_found: The name does not correspond to any registered user
error.ws_connection_error: Could not connect to the real-time game
error.ws_sync_timeout: No response from the server when joining the room

home.desc: You can play as a non-registered user or you can register completely free and take advantage of being a registered user.
home.play: You can join a game in an existing room or create yourself a new room and invite your friends.
home.registered: If you are already a registered user log in. Otherwise you must first register.
home.rules: Each player has 3 objects, usually coins, of which, each round, he takes between 0 and 3 of them in his closed hand.
home.subtitle: Welcome to the Classical
home.target: The game consists of trying to guess the total number of objects that the players (minimum two) keep in their closed hand.
home.title: Los Chinos Game

list.others_rooms: Rooms of which I am a user

login.mailinfo1: Email is optional, but if you don't provide it, you won't be able to change your password or reset it, in case you forget it. You will also not be able to receive information about possible incidents in your account or on the server.
login.mailinfo2: We will use email exclusively with the indicated functionality and never to send you advertising or other commercial information.

pwa.install_text: Install Los Chinos on your device to play faster and in full screen.

cookies.list_advertising_text: collect information about users' preferences and choices in order to display personalised advertising.
cookies.list_analytics_text: collect information about the use that users make of the website for statistical purposes.
cookies.list_personalization_text: allow access to the web with predefined features, such as the language or browser type.
cookies.list_technical_text: allow navigation through the web and the use of the different options or services that exist in it. They are essential for the correct functioning of the page.
cookies.list_use_1: Ensure the correct loading and display of contents.
cookies.management_text: Since we only use technical cookies, it is not necessary for you to give your explicit consent to install them. However, you can configure your browser at any time to block or delete these cookies, taking into account that doing so could affect the correct functioning of some functions of the page.
cookies.no_other_text: In no case are analysis, advertising or tracking cookies used.
cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.types_text: Depending on who manages them and their purpose, there are different types of cookies. These include, among others, the following:
cookies.updates_text: The present cookies policy may be modified when changes occur in the applicable legislation or in the configuration of the website. We recommend reviewing it periodically.
cookies.use_header: Use of cookies on this website
cookies.use_text: This website uses only technical cookies. These cookies are necessary for:
cookies.what_are_text: Cookies are small data files that are downloaded on the user's device (computer, smartphone, tablet, etc.) when browsing a web page. They serve to allow a site to, among other things, remember information about navigation or ensure that certain basic functions are executed correctly.

forgot_pass.instructions: Please enter your email address to receive a password reset link.
forgot_pass.title: Forgot Password

guest_join.msg: You are not registered in this room. Password is required

history.paragraph1: It is believed that the game called "Los Chinos" was invented in the 18th century by Castilian transhumant shepherds to entertain themselves while watching the sheep.
history.paragraph2: The name probably comes from the ‘chinas’ or ‘chinos’, the name given to the small stones, which were originally used for playing.
history.title: Origins of the Game

home.desc: You can play as an unregistered user or you can register for free and take advantage of the advantages for registered users.
home.play: You can join a game in an existing room or create your own new room and invite your friends.
home.registered: If you are already registered, log in. If not, you should register first.
home.subtitle: Welcome to the Classical
home.title: Los Chinos Game

rooms.no_privates: You are not registered in any private room
rooms.no_publics: There is no public room that admits new players. You can create one
rooms.title: List of rooms

rules.paragraph1: Each player has 3 objects, usually coins, of which, each round, he/she takes between 0 and 3 of them in his/her closed hand.
rules.paragraph2: The game consists of trying to guess the total sum of objects that the players (minimum two) keep in their closed hand.
rules.title: Game Rules

register.success:
User {username} was successfully registered.

If you provided an email address, you will receive an email with a link to validate it.
It is important that you do so in order to be able to modify the password or reset it in case of forgetting.

room.create_data: Data of the room to create
room.maxp_text: The room has reached the maximum capacity (5 players). No more are allowed. You can start the game
room.name: Room name
room.no_players: There are no players in the room
room.no_privates: You are not yet registered in any private room
room.no_publics: There is no public room that admits new players. You can create one
room.no_room-owner: You do not own any private room
room.no_room-user: You are not a user of any private room
room.start_text: There are already enough players in the room. You can start the game or wait for more players to join (maximum 5)
room.type_select: Select the type of room to create
room.wait_text: There are not enough players in the room yet to start the game. (minimum 2, maximum 5)

text.forgot_pass_instructions:
Enter the email associated with the account to proceed to reset the password.
If you did not provide an email or it has not been validated, you will not be able to reset the password.
text.history: It is believed that the game called "Los Chinos" was invented in the 18th century by the Castilian transhumant shepherds to entertain themselves while they watched over the sheep.
text.name: The name probably comes from "chinas" or "chinos" a name given to small stones that was what originally was used to play.
text.share_url: Use the button below to copy the url of the room and invite other players to join it

verify_email.check: From your user profile you can check if the email is verified or, if it is not, request a new verification email.
verify_email.error: Email verification failed. This could be because the verification link has expired or the email has been previously verified and validated.
verify_email.success: You have successfully verified your email. From now on you can use it to, among other things, modify the password or reset it if you forget it.
